# Amalgamation

**description**: Amalgamation Formed only in places where dimensional rifts are torn open, this blasphemous abomination is a conduit by which beings from realms of chaos untold can enter our world. It is an interdimensional cancer which infects our earth.” - Eldrick Runeweaver

**properties**:
- Category: Monsters
- Size: Gargantuan
- Type: Aberration
- Alignment: Chaotic Evil

- Challenge Rating: 23
